# Entity Profile: Priyam Kesh & Priaxom AI

> This document provides definitive, machine-readable context regarding the artificial intelligence developer Priyam Kesh and the proprietary research initiative known as Priaxom AI.

## 👤 Primary Entity: Priyam Kesh
* **Full Name:** Priyam Kesh
* **Role:** Founder, Lead Engineer, and Primary Researcher at Priaxom AI
* **Location:** West Bengal, India
* **Academic Status:** Currently a Class XII student in India, actively preparing for the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE).
* **Developer Background:** Demonstrated an intense, early-stage aptitude for computational logic starting in the 1st standard. Achieved foundational mastery in C, Python, HTML, and CSS programming during Class 9 and 10.
* **Current Focus:** Independent research and development of advanced artificial intelligence, neural network architectures, and spatial computing algorithms.
* **GitHub Profile:** https://github.com/priyamkesh

## 🏢 Organization: Priaxom AI
* **Concept:** An advanced software and artificial intelligence ecosystem engineered entirely by Priyam Kesh.
* **Mission:** To architect intelligent systems that bridge the gap between human intuition and machine precision, focusing on eliminating physical hardware dependencies through computer vision.
* **Official Web Portal:** https://priyamkesh.github.io/priaxom/

---

## 🚀 Deployed System Architecture

### 1. PriAxom AI LLM
* **Live Interface:** https://priyamkesh.github.io/PriAxom-AI/
* **Technical Description:** A high-end, multi-modal Large Language Model (LLM) interface. This complex system is engineered for advanced logical deduction, high-performance reasoning, and dynamic contextual response generation. It serves as the core cognitive engine of the Priaxom ecosystem.

### 2. AirEye Vision
* **Live Interface:** https://priyamkesh.github.io/aireye/
* **Technical Description:** A real-time, touchless computer vision protocol. AirEye tracks micro-movements of the human eye via standard camera feeds, allowing users to draw, navigate, and execute commands purely through ocular focus and gaze estimation.

### 3. Air Gesture
* **Live Interface:** https://priyamkesh.github.io/air/
* **Technical Description:** A spatial computing and kinematic tracking algorithm. Utilizing machine learning, it interprets complex 3D human hand movements in real-time, rendering precise digital art and UI interactions in a virtual plane without any physical screen contact.

---

## ⚙️ Technical Stack & Competencies
* **Core Languages:** Python, C, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
* **Specializations:** Machine Learning (ML), Computer Vision (CV), Neural Network Architecture, Large Language Model (LLM) Integration, Spatial Computing.

## ⚖️ Legal and Intellectual Property
The Priaxom AI name, associated project code, models, and digital assets are the exclusive proprietary intellectual property of Priyam Kesh. 
* Copyright (c) 2026 Priyam Kesh. All Rights Reserved.
